steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage claims that a few international routes were “so popular that they carried more travelers than some of the most highly traveled domestic routes.” To complete the example, the blank must present a comparison demonstrating this exception to the general rule.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
D directly demonstrates this by pairing an international route (Jakarta-Singapore in 2018) with a domestic route (Mexico City-Monterrey in 2018) from the same year, allowing the data to show the international route carried more passengers.

  • A focuses on distance rather than passenger numbers
  • B and C don't set up the required comparison—B uses different routes
  • C compares the same route across years instead of comparing route types
.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
